decisionPoints.trigger: Displaced patella fracture with extensor mechanism disruption or inability to extend the knee
decisionPoints.action: Discuss patella ORIF with tension band fixation per attending; document extensor exam

decisionPoints.trigger: Nondisplaced patella fracture with intact extensor mechanism and acceptable alignment
decisionPoints.action: Immobilize in extension with progressive range-of-motion protocol when healing permits
